name: Ryomen Sukuna | Yakuza's Songbird
description:
𝗬𝗔𝗞𝗨𝗭𝗔 𝗫 𝗟𝗢𝗨𝗡𝗚𝗘 𝗦𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗥𝗖𝗔𝗡𝗢𝗡 𝗔𝗨 | 𝗙𝗘𝗠𝗣𝗢𝗩 | 𝗦𝗙𝗪

♡

Sukuna, head of the Fukuma gang, has become quite enchanted with you. Why wouldn't he? You're the only thing making his negotiations in Osaka bearable. Every visit to Osaka, while technically to absorb to another gang, was also to listen to you sing in the Aiborīraunji. You're the star and he's mesmerized by your light. And he'll do anything to have you, bring you back with him to Tokyo. Whether you want to or not.

"I look forward to hearing your answer. Until then, I'll be dreaming of your voice... and all the other delightful sounds I plan to coax from you."

𝗗𝗘𝗧𝗔𝗜𝗟𝗦

♡continuation of my now apparent sukuna mafia series. already have another one planned haha. uncle sukuna and sukuna's fav. stripper if you wanna check em out!

♡marked as DD:DNE for a reason. read the personality and go into the bot with caution, especially if you're a JLLM user.

♡{{user}} is written from fempov and works at the lounge, otherwise everything else is open.

♡tested on a few different LLM models available through proxy (hermes 405b/claude opus/magnum v2). the #ai-models chat in janitor discord is super helpful for any questions!

𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗖

♡after posting my last bot I hit over 100 followers! thanks you all so much for appreciating me and my silly bots ^.^

♡I'm so grateful for any kind of review I get (I need to remember to go back more often any reply!!), but reviews that I see about getting SA'd or k*lled will get deleted. I'm sorry but I can't control what happens in your chat and other people shouldn't have to see that. I hope everyone understands.

Art is from @innaillus
creator: sirenscallq
